title: Preserve Decomposed Foundation Contract Surfaces
forbids: missing decomposed foundation operation names, domain artifact contract tags/validators, required strategy rules imports, or projection plate-motion/provenance currentness
why: Foundation contract currentness is a package-local validator for MapGen pipeline composition; artifact validation is owned by domain artifact files and exposed through the domain artifact aggregate.
message: Keep foundation positive/currentness surfaces aligned with decomposed foundation outputs and domain-owned artifact validators.
